vocab.example: Like most kids, I had boundless energy and would spend hours running around the neighborhood with my friends.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I loved playing with clay because it provided a wonderful tactile experience that digital games simply can't replicate.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi nhập vai đầy tưởng tượng
vocab.example: We used to engage in imaginative role-play, pretending to be explorers discovering uncharted territories in our backyard.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển ngồi một chỗ (ít vận động)
vocab.example: Solving jigsaw puzzles was a favorite sedentary pastime of mine during rainy afternoons.

vocab.meaning: phương thức để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Drawing provided a vital creative outlet for me to express my thoughts and feelings as a child.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự do (không theo quy tắc định sẵn)
vocab.example: I believe that unstructured play was essential for developing my problem-solving skills when I was young.

vocab.meaning: chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngoài trời
vocab.example: Our family's weekend outdoor excursions to the countryside were the highlight of my childhood.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with building complex structures out of Lego bricks.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác về một điều gì đó
vocab.example: Playing team sports helped foster a sense of belonging and taught me the value of cooperation.
Although I didn't have an innate talent for music, I thoroughly enjoyed plucking away at my small toy guitar.
